name: Talos AI Gateway
description: Talos-secured AI agent gateway with MCP and audit-backed orchestration.

extensions.description: Talos attestation headers and request verification metadata.
Talos encrypted session and frame transport layered on top of A2A.
Legacy Talos A2A JSON-RPC compatibility endpoint during migration.

skills.name: Tool Orchestration
skills.description: Execute MCP-backed tasks with Talos audit and policy enforcement.
examples: Route a tenant-safe MCP tool call and return the audited result.

skills.name: Secure Agent Coordination
skills.description: Coordinate multi-agent workflows with Talos attestation and secure-channel extensions.
examples: Create an audited handoff between two agents using Talos secure-channel extensions.

skills.name: Governed Admin Operations
skills.description: Operate Talos admin and governance surfaces with RBAC and audit constraints.
examples: List available MCP servers for the current tenant and explain policy constraints.
